message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "Adder" as Adder #98FB98
database Value #FFDAB9
entity Expression #F0E68C

User -> Adder : Start the operation
activate Adder
loop applyTo 
    loop getTypeMatrix  
        add note right of Adder\n#123456;note text here\nto see how to use color codes in notes end note    
            alt condition 1 then   
                return true     
             else if false       
                 break          
              endif        
           opt optional step      
               do something extra         
          par parallel process A & B             
         group critical section              
       activate Database               
      deactivate Entity                
     ref over all participants This is an important reference point across multiple lifelines!            
   rect rgb(200, 200, 255)                 
 box Grouped Elements Together For Clarity And Organization Purposes Only Not Part Of Actual Diagram Logic Or Flow Control Mechanisms Used Here Just As An Example To Show How Boxes Can Be Utilized Within Sequence Diagrams When Needed By Users Who Want More Structure In Their Visual Representations Without Having Too Much Complexity Added Into Them Unnecessarily Which Could Make Things Harder Than They Need To Be Understood Quickly At First Glance Especially If Someone Is Newish Towards Reading Such Kinds Of Charts Regularly Enough So That Everything Makes Sense Right Away Even Before Diving Deep Inside Each Individual Component Separately One After Another Sequentially Stepwise Manner Like We Are Doing Now Currently While Writing Out These Instructions Carefully Following Best
